Title: MemorySmith.Agent — Council Review History
Content:
Three council reviews have been completed (6 seats each, structured findings):

Phase 0/1 Kickoff (2026-06-15): Accepted Phase 0 skeleton. Phase 1 priorities: MockWorldAdapter, DI wiring, WebSocket bridge, MoveTo tool. Found that test package alignment with MemorySmith versions was needed.

Phase 2 Memory Integration (2026-06-15): Accepted Phase 2. Three fixes applied: (1) SearchResult.Kind field for page/memory disambiguation, (2) UpdatePageAsync graceful fallback for missing pages, (3) IHttpClientFactory adoption.

Phase 3 Planner Architecture (2026-06-15): Accepted Phase 3. One immediate fix: ReplanAsync was using ContinueWith(OnlyOnRanToCompletion) — replaced with await/try-catch. Three Phase 4 items deferred: adaptive execution (SearchMemory result -> MoveTo coords), GatherWood replan parameter preservation, block ID version sensitivity.

All council review pages are in Data/Pages/council/. Future reviews should follow the 6-seat format: Source-Grounded Archivist, Data Model Architect, Retrieval Specialist, Human Learning Advocate, Skeptical Reviewer, Synthesizer.
